service_line_config.name: aws
service_line_config.tech_context: This project deploys on Amazon Web Services. Key considerations: - Compute: EC2, ECS/Fargate, Lambda - Database: RDS, DynamoDB, ElastiCache - Storage: S3, EBS - Networking: VPC, ALB/NLB, Route53, CloudFront - Security: IAM, Security Groups, KMS, Secrets Manager - Monitoring: CloudWatch, X-Ray - IaC: CloudFormation or Terraform

artifact_overrides.architecture: Reference specific AWS services for each component: - Which compute service and why - Which database service and configuration - Networking topology (VPC, subnets, load balancer) - Security architecture (IAM, encryption, network isolation) Do NOT use generic terms like "the server" — name the AWS service.
artifact_overrides.nonfunctional_req: Include AWS-specific NFRs: - Auto-scaling configuration and limits - Multi-AZ or multi-region availability - Backup strategy (RDS snapshots, S3 versioning, cross-region replication) - Cost optimization (Reserved Instances, Savings Plans, right-sizing) - Security (KMS encryption at rest, TLS in transit) - Monitoring and alerting thresholds
